source_section.title_label_raw: Urban Agriculture Use Requirements General Urban Agriculture Use Requirements

sections.title_label_raw: Agriculture Use Requirements General Urban Agriculture Use Requirements

provisions.heading_context_raw: Agriculture Use Requirements General Urban Agriculture Use Requirements
provisions.text: The processing of urban agricultural products is permitted as an accessory use to any urban agriculture use listed in Tables 1A, 1B, 1C, or 1D.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Agriculture Use Requirements General Urban Agriculture Use Requirements
provisions.text: The sale of urban agricultural products grown or produced on- site, including processed urban agricultural products, is permitted as an accessory use to an educational farm use or an urban farm use.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Agriculture Use Requirements General Urban Agriculture Use Requirements
provisions.text: Except for an educational farm use, the keeping of horses, swine, roosters, and ruminants is prohibited.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Agriculture Use Requirements General Urban Agriculture Use Requirements
provisions.text: A greenhouse, including a rooftop greenhouse, may be used to contain all or part of an urban farm use.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Agriculture Use Requirements General Urban Agriculture Use Requirements
provisions.text: Signage requirements for an urban agriculture use are:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Agriculture Use Requirements General Urban Agriculture Use Requirements
provisions.text: in any DD, DH, CEN-2, CEN-1, COR, HR-2, HR-1, CDD- 2, CDD-1, CLI, LI, HRI, INS, UC-2, UC-1, PCF, or RPK zone, contained in Sections 462 to 465; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Agriculture Use Requirements General Urban Agriculture Use Requirements
provisions.text: in any ER-3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, contained in Sections 469 and 470.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Agriculture Use Requirements General Urban Agriculture Use Requirements
provisions.text: Excluding beehives, an accessory structure associated with an urban agriculture use shall meet the accessory structure built form and siting requirements of Sections 327 to 333. Keeping of Bees as an Accessory Use

sections.title_label_raw: In every zone, the keeping of bees as an accessory use is

provisions.heading_context_raw: In every zone, the keeping of bees as an accessory use is
provisions.text: In every zone, the keeping of bees as an accessory use is permitted, to a maximum of:

provisions.heading_context_raw: In every zone, the keeping of bees as an accessory use is
provisions.text: two beehives on lots of less than 2,000 square metres in area; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: In every zone, the keeping of bees as an accessory use is
provisions.text: four beehives on lots equal to or greater than 2,000 square metres in area.

provisions.heading_context_raw: In every zone, the keeping of bees as an accessory use is
provisions.text: Beehives shall be required to be located no less than 3.0 metres from any lot line (Diagram 1), unless they are located on a rooftop. Diagram 1: Shaded area denotes where beehives are permitted at grade, per Subsection 72(2) Keeping of Egg-Laying Hens as an Accessory Use

sections.title_label_raw: In every zone, the keeping of egg-laying hens is permitted as

provisions.heading_context_raw: In every zone, the keeping of egg-laying hens is permitted as
provisions.text: In every zone, the keeping of egg-laying hens is permitted as an accessory use.

provisions.heading_context_raw: In every zone, the keeping of egg-laying hens is permitted as
provisions.text: Excluding an educational farm use, the number of egg-laying hens shall not exceed ten per lot.

provisions.heading_context_raw: In every zone, the keeping of egg-laying hens is permitted as
provisions.text: All egg-laying hens shall be required to be kept within a fenced area or accessory structure that:

provisions.heading_context_raw: In every zone, the keeping of egg-laying hens is permitted as
provisions.text: is within a rear yard; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: In every zone, the keeping of egg-laying hens is permitted as
provisions.text: meets the accessory structure size requirements of Sections 331 to 333.

provisions.heading_context_raw: In every zone, the keeping of egg-laying hens is permitted as
provisions.text: A fenced area or accessory structure that contains egg-laying hens shall meet the watercourse buffer requirements under Section 75. In no circumstance shall the exemptions in Subsection 75(6) be used to reduce the required watercourse buffer.

provisions.heading_context_raw: In every zone, the keeping of egg-laying hens is permitted as
provisions.text: The on-site slaughtering of hens is prohibited.
